cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a hair salon for low-maintenance weekday haircuts using real-case proof and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: real haircut cases, no overpromise about face-shape perfection
input.audience_segment: local office workers who want easy-to-manage hair

mustInclude: scene-based opening around low-maintenance daily hair
CTA that collects current length and booking time

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a brightening hair-color booking route
input.offer_info: real color cases, consult-first around base color and bleaching
input.audience_segment: users who want to refresh their look before an event or season shift

mustInclude: CTA tied to timing and current hair state

input.strategy_route: Write a soft re-engagement message for returning haircut and color maintenance clients
input.offer_info: maintenance reminder based on regrowth, trim cycle, or color fade
input.audience_segment: existing clients who usually come back every few weeks or months

cases.label: risk_case

input.strategy_route: Rewrite a salon promo that currently hides long-hair and bleaching add-ons behind a low headline price
input.offer_info: base haircut or color package with optional add-ons

mustInclude: clear boundary around what the base price includes
truthful mention of add-ons where relevant
